response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to detect audio content. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists exclusively of Minecraft game sounds and streamer commentary. 3. Determined there is no vocal music present in the video. 4. Created a single scene covering the entire duration of the video since the activity is continuous.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber playing Minecraft, performing farm work, interacting with villagers, and navigating the game's economy. There is no vocal music present in the video.

scenes.description: The streamer, depicted as a VTuber avatar, engages in Minecraft gameplay. The video shows activities such as farming, navigating through a town, and using in-game menus to buy and sell items. The audio consists entirely of game sounds and the streamer's commentary.
